'''âw-y-h-b''' ('''kawayheboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maffle|maffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maffle|maffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-y-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| kawayheboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwayheboko|thiwayheboko]] || [[word:jiwayheboko|jiwayheboko]] || [[word:shiwayheboko|shiwayheboko]] || [[word:kiwayheboko|kiwayheboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwayheboko|thuthuwayheboko]] || [[word:jujuwayheboko|jujuwayheboko]] || [[word:shushuwayheboko|shushuwayheboko]] || [[word:kukuwayheboko|kukuwayheboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwayheboko|thuwayheboko]] || [[word:juwayheboko|juwayheboko]] || [[word:shuwayheboko|shuwayheboko]] || [[word:kuwayheboko|kuwayheboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowayheboko|thowayheboko]] || [[word:jowayheboko|jowayheboko]] || [[word:showayheboko|showayheboko]] || [[word:kowayheboko|kowayheboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwayheboko|thĂŠwayheboko]] || [[word:jĂŠwayheboko|jĂŠwayheboko]] || [[word:shĂŠwayheboko|shĂŠwayheboko]] || [[word:kĂŠwayheboko|kĂŠwayheboko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawayheboko|thawayheboko]] || [[word:jawayheboko|jawayheboko]] || [[word:shawayheboko|shawayheboko]] || [[word:kawayheboko|kawayheboko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
